nasb.text: Those who trust in the Lord Are as Mount Zion, which cannot be moved but abides forever.

esv.text: Those who trust in the Lord are like Mount Zion, which cannot be moved, but abides forever.

cnv.text: 倚靠耶和華的人好像錫安山， 總不動搖，永遠屹立。

ccb.text: 信靠耶和华的人就像锡安山永不动摇。

csbs.text: 依靠耶和华的人，就像锡安山， 不致动摇，永远屹立。
